name: Metal Wall Organizer 4 Hook Solid - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your home neatly organized in modern style with the Metal Wall Organizer 4 Hook from Brightroom™. This black organizer comes with four hooks to give you space for hanging coats, scarves and more. Made of metal in a powder-coated finish, this wall organizer makes a functional addition to your home whether you use it in your bath space, living area or any other area.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
